title: EQ - Select a value, disconnect/connect device - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting does not persist after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect on Poly Bluetooth audio device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on Audio Settings.
4. In Audio Settings, tap on Equalizer (EQ).
5. Select an EQ value from the available options: Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ.
6. Disconnect the Poly audio device (e.g., turn off the device or disable Bluetooth on the phone).
7. Reconnect the Poly audio device (e.g., turn the device back on or re-enable Bluetooth and pair).
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
9. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer (EQ).
10. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
expected: The EQ value selected in step 5 (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) should still be selected and active after the device is disconnected and reconnected.
